directories.purpose: Append-only interaction experiences for reflection and evolution.
directories.when_to_change: Append on substantive interactions; do not rewrite historical entries.

directories.purpose: Governance proposal queues and lifecycle records.
directories.when_to_change: When proposal state changes via review/canary/publish workflow.

directories.purpose: Structured reflection outputs used by EvoClaw evolution.
directories.when_to_change: After reflection runs produce new REF-* artifacts.

directories.purpose: Task execution history for runtime continuity and audits.
Governance decisions, file-op audit evidence and release records.
directories.when_to_change: On each governance decision or file policy action.

directories.purpose: Temporary workspace artifacts generated during active execution.
directories.when_to_change: During runtime execution; stale artifacts may be rotated/archived.
